title: ranunculus muricatus var. emuricatus
intro: Ranunculus muricatus var. emuricatus, also known as the prickly buttercup, is a lesser-known variety of the buttercup plant family. This plant is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it's valued for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus muricatus var. emuricatus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used to make teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
